ai-entity-extract.description: Detect named entities (people, organizations, products, locations) using an LLM

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the AI provider

batchConcurrency.description: Number of concurrent batch calls (0 or 1 = sequential)

batchSize.description: Number of blocks per LLM call (0 or 1 = one block per call)

engine.title: Extraction Engine
engine.description: llm (AI provider; default) / ner (local on-device model — nothing leaves the machine) / hybrid (both)

knownTerms.description: Terms to exclude from extraction (already in termbase)

ai-review.description: Review translations with scoring using an LLM provider

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the AI provider

ai-terminology.description: Extract candidate terminology from content using an LLM provider

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the AI provider

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: Subject domain for terminology extraction (e.g. medical legal technology)

brand-voice-check.description: Check text against a brand voice profile using an LLM provider

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the AI provider

profileId.title: Profile ID
profileId.description: Brand voice profile to resolve from the store

countInline.title: Count Inline Codes
countInline.description: Include inline code content in character counts

charset.title: Character Set Encoding
charset.description: Name of the character set encoding to check against (e.g. ISO-8859-1)

checkCharset.title: Check Against Charset Encoding
checkCharset.description: Warn if a character is not included in the specified character set encoding

checkCorrupted.title: Check Corrupted Characters
checkCorrupted.description: Check for common corruption patterns such as mojibake

forbiddenChars.title: Forbidden Characters
forbiddenChars.description: Characters that should not appear in target text (e.g. {}[])

requiredChars.title: Required Characters
requiredChars.description: Characters that must appear in target if present in source (e.g. punctuation)

includeSource.title: Include Source
includeSource.description: Include source text in character listing

includeTarget.title: Include Target
includeTarget.description: Include target text in character listing

fuzzyMatch.title: Fuzzy Match
fuzzyMatch.description: Enable fuzzy matching for similar texts

checkPerFile.title: Per-File Checking
checkPerFile.description: Process each input file individually instead of comparing segments across all documents

checkSourceInconsistency.title: Check Source Inconsistency
checkSourceInconsistency.description: Flag when different sources share the same translation

checkTargetInconsistency.title: Check Target Inconsistency
checkTargetInconsistency.description: Flag when the same source has different translations

displayOption.title: Inline Code Display
displayOption.description: Controls how inline codes are represented: original codes or generic markers or plain text

checkMaxCharLength.title: Check Maximum Length Ratio
checkMaxCharLength.description: Warn if target exceeds a percentage of source character length

checkMinCharLength.title: Check Minimum Length Ratio
checkMinCharLength.description: Warn if target is shorter than a percentage of source character length

maxCharLengthAbove.title: Percentage for Long Text (Max)
maxCharLengthAbove.description: Max percentage of source length allowed for long text

maxCharLengthBelow.title: Percentage for Short Text (Max)
maxCharLengthBelow.description: Max percentage of source length allowed for short text

maxCharLengthBreak.title: Short/Long Threshold (Max)
maxCharLengthBreak.description: Character count threshold between short and long text for max check

maxChars.title: Maximum Characters
maxChars.description: Absolute maximum character count for target text (0 = disabled)

maxPercentage.title: Maximum Length Percentage
maxPercentage.description: Maximum target/source length ratio as percentage (0 = disabled)

maxWords.title: Maximum Words
maxWords.description: Maximum word count for target text (0 = disabled)

minCharLengthAbove.title: Percentage for Long Text (Min)
minCharLengthAbove.description: Min percentage of source length allowed for long text

minCharLengthBelow.title: Percentage for Short Text (Min)
minCharLengthBelow.description: Min percentage of source length allowed for short text

minCharLengthBreak.title: Short/Long Threshold (Min)
minCharLengthBreak.description: Character count threshold between short and long text for min check

minPercentage.title: Minimum Length Percentage
minPercentage.description: Minimum target/source length ratio as percentage (0 = disabled)

media-refine.description: Re-read low-confidence OCR/ASR lines with a configurable multimodal LLM

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the AI provider

threshold.title: Confidence Threshold
threshold.description: Re-read extracted lines whose confidence is below this

expansionPercent.title: Expansion Percent
expansionPercent.description: Extra padding percentage added to simulate translation expansion (0 = no padding)

prefix.title: Prefix
prefix.description: Characters prepended before each translated block

suffix.title: Suffix
suffix.description: Characters appended after each translated block

qa.description: Check translation quality with rule-based checks, or an LLM when --provider is set

absoluteMaxCharLength.title: Absolute Maximum Characters
absoluteMaxCharLength.description: Maximum number of characters allowed in any target segment

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the AI provider

checkAbsoluteMaxCharLength.title: Check Absolute Maximum Length
checkAbsoluteMaxCharLength.description: Flag target segments that exceed an absolute character count limit

checkCodeDifference.title: Check Code Differences
checkCodeDifference.description: Verify that target segments have the same inline codes as source segments

checkCorruptedCharacters.title: Check Corrupted Characters
checkCorruptedCharacters.description: Check for patterns indicating encoding corruption (e.g. UTF-8 opened as ISO-8859-1)

checkDoubleSpaces.title: Check Double Spaces
checkDoubleSpaces.description: Check for double spaces in target text

checkDoubledWord.title: Warn on Doubled Words
checkDoubledWord.description: Check for consecutive repeated words in target text

checkEmptySource.title: Warn on Non-Empty Target with Empty Source
checkEmptySource.description: Check for non-empty target when source is empty

checkEmptyTarget.title: Warn on Empty Target
checkEmptyTarget.description: Check for empty target when source has content

checkLeadingWhitespace.title: Check Leading Whitespace
checkLeadingWhitespace.description: Check for leading whitespace mismatches between source and target

checkMaxCharLength.title: Check Maximum Length Ratio
checkMaxCharLength.description: Flag targets longer than a percentage of source character length

checkMinCharLength.title: Check Minimum Length Ratio
checkMinCharLength.description: Flag targets shorter than a percentage of source character length

checkPatterns.title: Check Patterns
checkPatterns.description: Verify that source patterns have expected corresponding content in the target

checkSpanConstraints.title: Check Span Constraints
checkSpanConstraints.description: Check non-deletable and non-cloneable span constraint violations

checkTargetSameAsSource.title: Warn on Target Same as Source
checkTargetSameAsSource.description: Check when target text is identical to source text

checkTrailingWhitespace.title: Check Trailing Whitespace
checkTrailingWhitespace.description: Check for trailing whitespace mismatches between source and target

checks.title: Quality Checks
checks.description: Quality checks to perform (e.g. terminology fluency accuracy consistency)

doubledWordExceptions.title: Doubled Word Exceptions
doubledWordExceptions.description: Semicolon-separated list of words allowed to repeat (e.g. sie;vous;nous)

maxCharLengthAbove.title: Percentage for Long Text (Max)
maxCharLengthAbove.description: Maximum allowed percentage of source length for long text

maxCharLengthBelow.title: Percentage for Short Text (Max)
maxCharLengthBelow.description: Maximum allowed percentage of source length for short text

maxCharLengthBreak.title: Short/Long Threshold (Max)
maxCharLengthBreak.description: Character count above which text is considered long for the maximum length check

minCharLengthAbove.title: Percentage for Long Text (Min)
minCharLengthAbove.description: Minimum required percentage of source length for long text

minCharLengthBelow.title: Percentage for Short Text (Min)
minCharLengthBelow.description: Minimum required percentage of source length for short text

minCharLengthBreak.title: Short/Long Threshold (Min)
minCharLengthBreak.description: Character count above which text is considered long for the minimum length check

provider.title: AI Provider
provider.description: LLM provider for AI-judged QA (omit for rule-based checks)

strictCodeOrder.title: Enforce Strict Code Order
strictCodeOrder.description: Flag differences when codes appear in a different order between source and target

targetSameAsSourceWithCodes.title: Include Codes in Comparison
targetSameAsSourceWithCodes.description: Include inline codes when comparing source and target for identity

targetSameAsSourceWithNumbers.title: Include Number-Only Segments
targetSameAsSourceWithNumbers.description: Include number-only segments in same-as-source comparison

redact.description: Replace sensitive spans with protected placeholders before processing

detectors.title: Detectors
detectors.description: Detection backends to run: rules and/or entities

rulesPath.title: Rules File
rulesPath.description: Path to a redaction rules YAML file

allowSourceMutation.title: Allow Source Mutation
allowSourceMutation.description: Permit the script to modify the source text (off by default; source is read-only)

dotAll.title: Dot Also Matches Line-Feed
dotAll.description: Make the period character match every character including line-feed

ignoreCase.title: Ignore Case Differences
ignoreCase.description: Ignore case when matching search patterns

multiLine.title: Multiline Mode
multiLine.description: Make ^ and $ match at the beginning and end of each line

regEx.title: Use Regular Expressions
regEx.description: Enable regular expression mode for all search patterns

replaceAll.title: Replace All Instances
replaceAll.description: Replace all matches instead of only the first

source.title: Replace in Source Content
source.description: Perform search and replace on source content

target.title: Replace in Target Content
target.description: Perform search and replace on target content

credential.title: Credential
credential.description: Stored credential name for the llm engine

engine.title: Segmentation Engine
engine.description: Segmenter backend: srx (rule-based; default)/ uax29 (Unicode baseline)/ llm (semantic chunks)/ sat (ML model)

instruction.title: Chunking Instruction
instruction.description: Optional guidance for the llm engine

layer.title: Overlay Layer
layer.description: Segmentation overlay layer name; empty uses the engine's natural layer

model.title: Model
model.description: Model name for the llm or sat engine

overwriteSegmentation.title: Overwrite Existing Segmentation
overwriteSegmentation.description: Re-segment already-segmented blocks replacing previous segmentation

provider.title: LLM Provider
provider.description: AI provider id for the llm engine

renumberCodes.title: Renumber Code IDs
renumberCodes.description: Renumber inline code IDs when materializing segments to a bilingual format

satModel.title: SaT Model
satModel.description: SaT model for the sat engine (e.g. sat-3l-sm

sourceSrxPath.title: Source SRX Rules Path
sourceSrxPath.description: Path to an SRX 2.0 rules file for source text (srx engine)

targetSrxPath.title: Target SRX Rules Path
targetSrxPath.description: Path to an SRX 2.0 rules file for target text (srx engine)

threshold.title: Boundary Threshold
threshold.description: Boundary probability threshold for the sat engine (0 = model default)

treatIsolatedCodesAsWhitespace.title: Treat Isolated Codes as Whitespace
treatIsolatedCodesAsWhitespace.description: Treat isolated inline codes as whitespace during segmentation

trimLeadingWhitespace.title: Trim Leading Whitespace
trimLeadingWhitespace.description: Exclude leading whitespace from each segment span

trimTrailingWhitespace.title: Trim Trailing Whitespace
trimTrailingWhitespace.description: Exclude trailing whitespace from each segment span

downgradeIdenticalBestMatches.title: Downgrade Identical Exact Matches
downgradeIdenticalBestMatches.description: Reduce score by 1%% when multiple identical exact matches are returned

fillIfTargetIsEmpty.title: Only If Target Is Empty
fillIfTargetIsEmpty.description: Fill the target only when it has no existing content

fillTarget.title: Fill Target with Translation
fillTarget.description: Copy the best translation candidate into the target content

fillTargetThreshold.title: Fill Target Threshold
fillTargetThreshold.description: Minimum match score required to fill the target

makeTmx.title: Generate TMX Document
makeTmx.description: Create a TMX file with all leveraged matches

noQueryThreshold.title: No-Query Threshold
noQueryThreshold.description: Skip TM query if existing candidate scores at or above this value (101 = always query)

tmxPath.title: TMX Output Path
tmxPath.description: File path for the generated TMX document

translate.description: Translate content with an LLM or machine-translation provider (select with --provider)

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the AI provider

batchConcurrency.title: Batch Concurrency
batchConcurrency.description: Number of concurrent batch calls (0 or 1 = sequential)

batchSize.title: Batch Size
batchSize.description: Number of blocks per LLM call

email.title: Email
email.description: Account email for higher rate limits (mymemory)

skipMatched.title: Skip Matched
skipMatched.description: Skip blocks that already have a target translation

caseSensitive.title: Case Sensitive
caseSensitive.description: Take case differences into account when comparing

document1Label.title: Document 1 Label
document1Label.description: Label for the first translation in reports

document2Label.title: Document 2 Label
document2Label.description: Label for the second translation in reports

genericCodes.title: Use Generic Codes
genericCodes.description: Use generic numbered tags (e.g. <1>...</1>) instead of original inline codes in reports

punctuationSensitive.title: Punctuation Sensitive
punctuationSensitive.description: Take punctuation differences into account when comparing

whitespaceSensitive.title: Whitespace Sensitive
whitespaceSensitive.description: Take whitespace differences into account when comparing

unredact.description: Restore original values into redacted content after processing

countInline.title: Count Inline Codes
countInline.description: Include inline code content in word counts

extractComments.title: Extract comments as notes
extractComments.description: Surface an XML comment immediately preceding an entry as a translator note on the emitted block. Comments always round-trip verbatim regardless of this setting.

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Surface non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: Surface <string>/<string-array>/<plurals> entries marked translatable="false" as non-translatable content blocks (visible to ingestion, skipped by MT). When off, such entries stay in opaque skeleton and round-trip verbatim. Bare resource references are always skeleton.

skipNonTranslatable.title: Skip translatable="false" entries
skipNonTranslatable.description: Exclude <string>/<string-array>/<plurals> entries marked translatable="false" from extraction. Such resources are developer-owned and round-trip verbatim.

skipResourceReferences.title: Skip resource references
skipResourceReferences.description: Exclude <string> values that are a bare resource reference (e.g. @string/foo, ?attr/bar). A reference is an alias, not translatable UI text.

extractComments.title: Extract comments as notes
extractComments.description: Surface a /* ... */ or // ... comment preceding a .strings entry as a translator note on the emitted block.

protectPlaceholders.title: Protect format placeholders
protectPlaceholders.description: Lift printf-style specifiers (%@, %lld, %1$@) and .stringsdict %#@var@ tokens into inline codes so they are never translated.

descriptionNotes.title: Surface descriptions as notes
descriptionNotes.description: Surface the human-facing context in a resource's sibling "@<id>" attributes object as developer notes: the resource "description" plus each placeholder's "example"/"description" hint. The attributes object is always preserved byte-faithfully on round-trip regardless of this setting.

extractBlockTitles.title: Extract block titles
extractBlockTitles.description: Emit AsciiDoc block titles (`.Title`) as translatable blocks. When false they are preserved verbatim as skeleton.

extractTableCells.title: Extract table cells
extractTableCells.description: Emit `|===` table cells as translatable blocks grouped into table / table-row groups. When false the table is preserved verbatim.

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

columnNamesRow.title: Column Names Row
columnNamesRow.description: 1-based row number containing column names. 0 means auto-detect.

commentColumns.title: Comment Columns
commentColumns.description: Column indices (0-based) that contain comments or notes

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Extract non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true (default), non-translatable contextual content such as preamble rows and non-translatable column cells is surfaced as content blocks (visible to ingestion/LLM consumers, skipped by machine translation) instead of opaque data. Disable to keep it as plain data parts.

hasHeader.title: Has Header Row
hasHeader.description: If true, the first row is treated as headers (non-translatable)

keyColumns.title: Key Columns
keyColumns.description: Column indices (0-based) that provide the block ID (source ID / record ID)

separator.title: Field Delimiter
separator.description: Field delimiter character (comma for CSV, tab for TSV)

textQualifier.title: Text Qualifier
textQualifier.description: Character used to quote field values containing delimiters or newlines

translatableColumns.title: Translatable Columns
translatableColumns.description: Column indices (0-based) to extract as translatable content. If empty, all columns are translatable.

trimValues.title: Trim Values
trimValues.description: If true, leading and trailing whitespace is removed from cell values

useCodeFinder.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within cell values

valuesStartRow.title: Values Start Row
valuesStartRow.description: 1-based row number where data values begin. 0 means auto-detect.

extractDescriptions.title: Extract $description documentation
extractDescriptions.description: Extract $description values (human-readable token and group documentation) as translatable blocks. This is the only natural-language field in DTCG; $value is always a typed design value (colour, dimension, font name, …) and is never extracted. Disable to read the file as fully non-translatable structure.

codeFinderRules.title: Code finder rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Extract non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true (default), non-translatable contextual content such as \code…\endcode and \verbatim…\endverbatim region bodies is surfaced as content blocks (visible to ingestion/LLM consumers, skipped by machine translation) instead of being hidden in skeleton. Disable to keep it in skeleton.

preserveWhitespace.title: Preserve whitespace
preserveWhitespace.description: Preserve original whitespace in extracted comment text instead of normalizing it

useCodeFinder.title: Enable inline code detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based detection of inline codes within translatable text

attributes.title: Attribute Rules
attributes.description: Global attribute extraction rules -- maps attribute names to their rule configuration (ruleTypes, allElementsExcept, onlyTheseElements, conditions)

codeFinderRules.title: Code finder rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

elements.title: Element Rules
elements.description: Element extraction rules -- maps element names to their rule configuration (ruleTypes, conditions, idAttributes, translatableAttributes)

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Extract non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true (default), renderable non-translatable contextual content -- the <noscript> fallback subtree and JSON data islands (<script type="application/ld+json"|"application/json">) -- is surfaced as content blocks (visible to ingestion/LLM consumers, skipped by machine translation) instead of being hidden in skeleton. Generic executable <script> and <style> always stay opaque.

parser.title: Parser behavior
parser.description: Settings that control how the HTML parser reads input

useCodeFinder.title: Enable inline code detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, variables, tags) within translatable text

legacyPluralForms.title: Recognise legacy plural forms
legacyPluralForms.description: Recognise the legacy v1–v3 plural sibling keys (key_plural and the numeric key_0 / key_1 / key_2 … forms) in addition to the v4 CLDR suffixes (_zero / _one / _two / _few / _many / _other).

protectInterpolation.title: Protect interpolation and nesting
protectInterpolation.description: Detect i18next interpolation ({{var}}, {{var, format}}) and nesting ($t(key)) and protect them as inline codes so they are never translated.

subfilterHtmlValues.title: Subfilter HTML values (_html keys)
subfilterHtmlValues.description: Hand values whose key ends in "_html" (the i18next convention for markup) to the HTML subfilter so tags are protected and text remains translatable. Off by default: the HTML subfilter is not byte-faithful for bare markup fragments.

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text.

escapeForwardSlashes.title: Escape forward slashes
escapeForwardSlashes.description: Escape forward slashes in output JSON (\/).

exceptions.title: Key exception pattern
exceptions.description: Regex pattern for key names. When extractAllPairs is true, matching keys are excluded. When false, matching keys are included.

extractAllPairs.title: Extract all key/string pairs
extractAllPairs.description: Extract all key-value pairs for translation. When false, use extractionRules to specify which paths to extract.

extractIsolatedStrings.title: Extract strings without associated key
extractIsolatedStrings.description: Extract string values in arrays (without keys) as translatable blocks.

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Extract non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true (default), non-translatable string content — isolated array strings and values excluded by the extraction rules — is surfaced as content blocks (visible to ingestion/LLM consumers, skipped by machine translation) instead of being hidden in skeleton. Disable to keep it in skeleton.

extractionRules.title: Extraction rules
extractionRules.description: Regex pattern for JSON paths to extract. Overrides extractAllPairs when specified.

genericMetaRules.title: Generic metadata rules
genericMetaRules.description: Regex for keys whose values become generic metadata.

idRules.title: ID rules
idRules.description: Regex for keys whose values become Block IDs (overrides useKeyAsName).

maxwidthRules.title: Maxwidth rules
maxwidthRules.description: Regex for keys whose values set max width constraints.

noteRules.title: Note rules
noteRules.description: Regex for keys whose values become translator notes.

subfilter.title: Subfilter format
subfilter.description: Global subfilter format name (e.g., 'html') applied to all or matching extracted strings.

subfilterRules.title: Sub-filter rules
subfilterRules.description: Regex matching keys for which values should be processed with the sub-filter.

subfilters.title: Subfilter mappings
subfilters.description: Array of {pattern, format} mappings for embedded content in specific keys.

useCodeFinder.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, tags, etc.).

useFullKeyPath.title: Use the full key path
useFullKeyPath.description: Use full path (/key1/key2) instead of immediate key as name.

useIdStack.title: Use the full path of IDs for resname
useIdStack.description: Build TextUnit IDs from nested key stack.

useKeyAsName.title: Use the key as the resname
useKeyAsName.description: Use JSON key as the Block (TextUnit) name for reference.

useLeadingSlashOnKeyPath.title: Include leading "/" on key path
useLeadingSlashOnKeyPath.description: Include leading slash in key path names.

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Extract non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true (default), non-translatable contextual content such as code blocks is surfaced as content blocks (visible to ingestion/LLM consumers, skipped by machine translation) instead of being hidden in skeleton. Disable to keep it in skeleton.

frontMatterKeys.title: Front Matter Keys
frontMatterKeys.description: Front matter keys to extract when translateFrontMatter is on (empty = every scalar value). Set the prose-bearing keys, e.g. title and description.

subfilter.title: HTML Subfilter
subfilter.description: Subfilter format to apply to HTML content within Markdown (e.g., 'html')

translateBlockQuotes.title: Translate Block Quotes
translateBlockQuotes.description: If true, blockquote content is translatable.

translateCodeBlocks.title: Translate Code Blocks
translateCodeBlocks.description: If true, fenced and indented code blocks are translatable. If false, emitted as non-translatable data.

translateFrontMatter.title: Translate YAML Front Matter
translateFrontMatter.description: If true, YAML front matter values are translatable. If false, emitted as non-translatable data.

translateHTMLBlocks.title: Translate HTML Blocks
translateHTMLBlocks.description: If true, raw HTML blocks are translatable. If false, emitted as non-translatable data.

translateImageAlt.title: Translate Image Alt Text
translateImageAlt.description: If true, image alt text is included in translatable content.

translateURLs.title: Translate Hyperlink URLs
translateURLs.description: If true, link and image URLs are translatable.

unescapeBackslashCharacters.title: Support Backslash Escaping
unescapeBackslashCharacters.description: Parse backslash-escaped punctuation in source documents

useCodeFinder.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within translatable text

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text.

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Surface Non-Translatable Content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true, MDX-specific non-translatable content (block-level JSX text children, GFM table cell prose, and markdown spans that cannot be reconstructed faithfully) is surfaced as non-translatable content blocks (visible to ingestion, skipped by MT) while staying byte-faithful on round-trip. If false, those constructs stay opaque.

frontMatterKeys.title: Front Matter Keys
frontMatterKeys.description: Front matter keys to extract when translateFrontMatter is on (empty = every scalar value). Set the prose-bearing keys, e.g. title and description.

translateBlockQuotes.title: Translate Block Quotes
translateBlockQuotes.description: If true, blockquote content is translatable.

translateCodeBlocks.title: Translate Code Blocks
translateCodeBlocks.description: If true, fenced and indented code blocks are translatable. If false, emitted as non-translatable data.

translateFrontMatter.title: Translate YAML Front Matter
translateFrontMatter.description: If true, YAML front matter values are translatable. If false, emitted as non-translatable data.

translateHTMLBlocks.title: Translate HTML Blocks
translateHTMLBlocks.description: If true, raw HTML blocks are translatable. If false, emitted as non-translatable data.

translateImageAlt.title: Translate Image Alt Text
translateImageAlt.description: If true, image alt text is included in translatable content.

translateURLs.title: Translate Hyperlink URLs
translateURLs.description: If true, link and image URLs are translatable.

useCodeFinder.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within translatable text.

aggressiveCleanup.title: Aggressive code cleanup
aggressiveCleanup.description: Strip revision IDs, proofing errors, and other noise before merging runs.

automaticallyAcceptRevisions.title: Accept revisions automatically
automaticallyAcceptRevisions.description: Automatically accept tracked changes before extraction. When true (default, matching Okapi), inserted runs are kept and deleted runs are dropped; rows marked with <w:trPr><w:del/> (ECMA-376 §17.13.5.13) are removed entirely; rows marked with <w:trPr><w:ins/> (§17.13.5.16) are kept.

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text.

excludeColors.title: Exclude specific font colors
excludeColors.description: Font colors to exclude (hex RGB, e.g., "FF0000" for red).

excludedSheets.title: Excluded sheets
excludedSheets.description: Sheet names to exclude from extraction.

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Extract non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true (default), non-translatable contextual content is surfaced — image/shape alt-text (descr/title on docPr/cNvPr) as content blocks (visible to ingestion/LLM consumers, skipped by machine translation), and PowerPoint/Excel comment text as data parts — instead of being hidden in opaque skeleton. Disable to keep it opaque.

extractRunFontsInfo.title: Extract run fonts info
extractRunFontsInfo.description: Emit font metadata as annotations on blocks.

fontMappings.title: Font mappings
fontMappings.description: Font name to script group mapping (e.g., "MS Gothic": "ja").

ignoreSoftHyphenTag.title: Ignore soft hyphen tags
ignoreSoftHyphenTag.description: Ignore soft hyphen tags in the document.

includeHighlightColors.title: Include highlight colors
includeHighlightColors.description: If non-empty, only extract text with these highlight colors.

includeStyles.title: Include styles
includeStyles.description: If non-empty, only extract text with these styles.

includedSlides.title: Included slide numbers
includedSlides.description: If non-empty, only extract these slide numbers (1-based).

lineSeparatorReplacement.title: Line separator replacement string
lineSeparatorReplacement.description: Replacement string for line separator characters.

replaceLineSeparator.title: Add line separator as character
replaceLineSeparator.description: Replace Unicode line separator (U+2028) in output.

replaceNoBreakHyphenTag.title: Replace no-break hyphen tags
replaceNoBreakHyphenTag.description: Replace no-break hyphen tags with the non-breaking hyphen character.

tabAsCharacter.title: Add tab as character
tabAsCharacter.description: Treat tab elements as tab characters instead of placeholder spans.

translateComments.title: Translate comments
translateComments.description: Extract comment text from Word documents.

translateDocProperties.title: Translate document properties
translateDocProperties.description: Extract title, subject, keywords from document properties.

translateFootnotes.title: Translate footnotes and endnotes
translateFootnotes.description: Extract footnotes and endnotes from Word documents.

translateHeadersFooters.title: Translate headers and footers
translateHeadersFooters.description: Extract text from headers and footers in Word documents.

translateHiddenSlides.title: Translate hidden slides
translateHiddenSlides.description: Extract content from hidden slides in PowerPoint.

translateHiddenText.title: Translate hidden text
translateHiddenText.description: Extract text with the vanish (hidden) property in Word documents.

translateSharedStrings.title: Translate shared strings
translateSharedStrings.description: Extract shared strings from Excel workbooks.

translateSheetNames.title: Translate sheet names
translateSheetNames.description: Extract sheet names in Excel workbooks.

translateSlideMasters.title: Translate master slides
translateSlideMasters.description: Extract text from slide masters in PowerPoint.

translateSlideNotes.title: Translate slide notes
translateSlideNotes.description: Extract speaker notes in PowerPoint presentations.

useCodeFinder.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, tags, etc.).

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Extract non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true (default), skipped PHP string literals are surfaced as non-translatable content blocks (visible to ingestion/LLM consumers, skipped by machine translation) instead of being hidden in skeleton. Disable to keep them in skeleton.

extractOutsideDirectives.title: Extract outside the scope of the directives
extractOutsideDirectives.description: Extract translatable strings found outside directive-controlled regions.

useDirectives.title: Use localization directives
useDirectives.description: Honor //okapi: skip/text directives in PHP source to control extraction scope.

segmentByLine.description: If true, each line becomes a separate block. If false, paragraphs (separated by blank lines) are blocks.

allowEmptyOutputTarget.title: Allow Empty Target Output
allowEmptyOutputTarget.description: Allow empty target in output when no translation is available

bilingualMode.title: Bilingual Mode
bilingualMode.description: In bilingual mode (default), msgid is the source text and msgstr is the target. In monolingual mode, msgid is treated as an ID.

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

preserveUntranslated.title: Preserve Untranslated Entries
preserveUntranslated.description: If true, entries with empty msgstr are emitted as blocks. If false, they are skipped.

useCodeFinder.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within PO message text

wrapContent.title: Wrap Long Content Lines
wrapContent.description: Wrap long content lines in output at approximately 80 characters

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

commentsAreNotes.title: Comments as Notes
commentsAreNotes.description: Treat comments as translator notes attached to the following entry

escapeExtendedChars.title: Escape Extended Characters
escapeExtendedChars.description: Escape extended Unicode characters (non-ASCII) in output using \uXXXX notation

extraComments.title: Additional Comment Markers
extraComments.description: Recognize semicolon and double-slash comment styles in addition to standard # and ! markers

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Surface Excluded Values
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: Surface the value text of excluded entries (keys filtered out, or under #_skip / #_bskip) as non-translatable content blocks visible to ingestion but skipped by translation

extractOnlyMatchingKey.title: Extract Only Matching Keys
extractOnlyMatchingKey.description: When enabled, extract only entries whose keys match the condition; otherwise exclude matching keys

keyCondition.title: Key Condition Pattern
keyCondition.description: Regular expression pattern to test against property keys for extraction filtering

useCodeFinder.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within property values

useJavaEscapes.title: Retain Java Escapes
useJavaEscapes.description: Keep Java property escape sequences (\: \= \# \!) in extracted text instead of resolving them

useKeyCondition.title: Enable Key Condition
useKeyCondition.description: Filter entries for extraction based on a regex condition applied to their keys

extractComments.title: Extract comments as notes
extractComments.description: Surface each string <data> entry's sibling <comment> element as a translator note on the emitted block. Comments always round-trip verbatim regardless of this setting.

skipNameDataReferences.title: Skip name-reference entries
skipNameDataReferences.description: Exclude designer name-reference entries (those whose name starts with ">", e.g. ">>control.Name") from extraction. These carry WinForms field names, not UI strings.

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within extracted text.

extractAnnotations.title: Translate Annotations
extractAnnotations.description: If true, text in \annotation (review comment) destinations is extracted as translatable content. If false (default), the comment text rides as block note metadata when extractNonTranslatableContent is on.

extractBookmarks.title: Translate Bookmarks
extractBookmarks.description: If true, \bkmkstart / \bkmkend bookmark labels are extracted as translatable text. Off by default — bookmarks are structural anchors, not user-visible copy.

extractHeadersFooters.title: Translate Headers and Footers
extractHeadersFooters.description: If true, text in \header* and \footer* destinations is extracted as translatable content. If false (default), it is surfaced as non-translatable content when extractNonTranslatableContent is on, otherwise kept in skeleton.

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Extract non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true (default), non-translatable contextual content — headers/footers, \info title/doccomm metadata, and \xe/\tc index/TOC entries — is surfaced as role-tagged content blocks (visible to ingestion/LLM consumers, skipped by machine translation) and \annotation review comments ride as note metadata. Disable to keep all of it in skeleton.

useCodeFinder.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within extracted text.

codeFinderRules.title: Code finder rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

exitOnInvalid.title: Exit on invalid TUs
exitOnInvalid.description: Stop processing when encountering invalid TUs. When false, invalid TUs are skipped.

processAllTargets.title: Read all target entries
processAllTargets.description: Read all target language TUVs from each TU. When false, only the first target is read.

useCodeFinder.title: Enable inline code detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection in translatable text

cjkCharsPerLine.title: Max characters per line for CJK
cjkCharsPerLine.description: Maximum number of characters per line for CJK languages. Set to 0 to disable.

escapeBR.title: Escape line breaks
escapeBR.description:
When true,
elements are removed and text is joined with spaces; when false,
is preserved as literal text.

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Extract non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true (default), non-translatable head metadata such as ttm:title, ttm:desc, ttm:copyright and ttm:agent is surfaced as content blocks (visible to ingestion/LLM consumers, skipped by machine translation) instead of being hidden in skeleton. Disable to keep it in skeleton.

maxCharsPerLine.title: Max characters per line
maxCharsPerLine.description: Maximum number of characters per line in output. Set to 0 to disable.

maxLinesPerCaption.title: Max lines per caption
maxLinesPerCaption.description: Maximum number of lines per caption in output. Set to 0 to disable.

mergeAdjacentCaptions.title: Merge adjacent captions
mergeAdjacentCaptions.description:
Merge adjacent

elements ending with trailing punctuation into one block.

splitWords.title: Split words at character limit
splitWords.description: Split words so that they don't go over the character limit per line.

cjkCharsPerLine.title: Max characters per line for CJK
cjkCharsPerLine.description: Maximum number of characters per line for CJK languages. Set to 0 to disable.

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Extract non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true (default), non-translatable contextual content such as a STYLE block's embedded CSS is surfaced as a content block (visible to ingestion/LLM consumers, skipped by machine translation) instead of being hidden. Disable to keep the legacy opaque behavior.

maxCharsPerLine.title: Max characters per line
maxCharsPerLine.description: Maximum number of characters per line in output. Set to 0 to disable.

maxLinesPerCaption.title: Max lines per caption
maxLinesPerCaption.description: Maximum number of lines per caption in output. Set to 0 to disable.

splitWords.title: Split words at character limit
splitWords.description: Split words so that they don't go over the character limit per line.

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Extract non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true (default), non-translatable contextual content such as DokuWiki <code>/<file>/<html>/<php> block bodies and indented code blocks is surfaced as content blocks (visible to ingestion/LLM consumers, skipped by machine translation) instead of being hidden in skeleton. Disable to keep it in skeleton.

preserveWhitespace.title: Preserve Whitespace
preserveWhitespace.description: Preserve original whitespace in wiki markup instead of normalizing it.

variant.title: Wiki variant
variant.description: Wiki markup variant: mediawiki or dokuwiki. Default is dokuwiki to match the okf_wiki bridge contract.

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Surface non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: Surface an entry's developer comment via a non-translatable fallback block when the entry has no translatable leaf (no localizations, an empty localizations object, or a stale entry skipped because extractStale is off). When off, the part stream is byte-identical to the prior behavior.

extractStale.title: Extract stale entries
extractStale.description: Emit entries whose extractionState is "stale" (the source string no longer appears in the code base) as translatable blocks.

markTranslatedState.title: State for new translations
markTranslatedState.description: The stringUnit state value written for a localization populated for the first time. Existing states are preserved verbatim on round-trip.

addAltTrans.title: Add alt-trans elements
addAltTrans.description: Allow addition of new alt-trans elements

addTargetLanguage.title: Add target-language attribute
addTargetLanguage.description: Add the target-language attribute to file elements if not already present

allowEmptyTargets.title: Allow empty targets
allowEmptyTargets.description: Allow target elements with empty content to be written

alwaysAddTargets.title: Add targets for monolingual XLIFF
alwaysAddTargets.description: Add target elements for monolingual XLIFF files that have no target in the source

codeFinderRules.title: Code finder rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

editAltTrans.title: Edit alt-trans elements
editAltTrans.description: Allow editing of existing alt-trans elements

fallbackToID.title: Use trans-unit ID as name if no resname
fallbackToID.description: Use the trans-unit id attribute as the block name when no resname attribute is present

forceUniqueIds.title: Enforce unique trans-unit IDs
forceUniqueIds.description: Rewrite trans-unit IDs to enforce uniqueness across the file

ignoreInputSegmentation.title: Ignore input segmentation
ignoreInputSegmentation.description: Ignore seg-source/mrk segmentation from the input XLIFF and treat the full source as a single segment

includeExtensions.title: Include XLIFF extension elements
includeExtensions.description: Include non-standard namespace extension elements in extracted content

includeIts.title: Include ITS markup
includeIts.description: Include ITS (Internationalization Tag Set) markup in extracted content

overrideTargetLanguage.title: Override target language
overrideTargetLanguage.description: Override the target-language attribute in the output document with the pipeline target locale

preserveSpaceByDefault.title: Preserve whitespace by default
preserveSpaceByDefault.description: Treat all content as xml:space="preserve" unless explicitly overridden

targetStateValue.title: Target state value
targetStateValue.description: State value to set on target elements when useTranslationTargetState is enabled

useCodeFinder.title: Enable inline code detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection in translatable text

useTranslationTargetState.title: Update target state attribute
useTranslationTargetState.description: Update the state attribute on target elements when writing translated XLIFF

codeFinderRules.title: Code finder rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

discardInvalidTargets.title: Discard invalid targets
discardInvalidTargets.description: Discard targets that fail validation rather than rejecting the entire file

forceUniqueIds.title: Ensure unique tag IDs
forceUniqueIds.description: Ensure inline tag IDs are unique within each unit

ignoreTagTypeMatch.title: Ignore tag type mismatch
ignoreTagTypeMatch.description: Ignore tag type mismatch between source and target segments

useCodeFinder.title: Enable inline code detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection in translatable text

version.title: XLIFF version
version.description: Target XLIFF 2.x version to emit. Empty means: preserve the input document version on roundtrip, otherwise default to 2.2.

writeOriginalData.title: Include original data in output
writeOriginalData.description: Output includes original data when available

attributes.title: Attribute rules
attributes.description: Advanced attribute-specific processing rules with element scope constraints

blockTypeMap.title: Block type map
blockTypeMap.description: Map of element names to block type strings for semantic type annotation

codeFinderRules.title: Code finder rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

elements.title: Element rules
elements.description: Advanced element-specific processing rules with conditions, inline marking, and translatable attribute mappings

excludeByDefault.title: Exclude by default
excludeByDefault.description: Exclude all elements unless explicitly included by an element rule with INCLUDE

excludedElements.title: Excluded elements
excludedElements.description: Element names whose content is excluded from extraction

extractNonTranslatableContent.title: Extract non-translatable content
extractNonTranslatableContent.description: If true (default), non-translatable contextual content such as whitelist-excluded element text and verbatim code/pre subtrees is surfaced as content blocks (visible to ingestion/LLM consumers, skipped by machine translation) instead of being hidden in skeleton. Disable to keep it in skeleton.

groupElements.title: Group elements
groupElements.description: Element names that produce group/layer boundaries in the output

idAttributes.title: ID attributes
idAttributes.description: Attribute names used to extract block IDs from elements

inlineElements.title: Inline elements
inlineElements.description: Element names treated as inline (spans within text) rather than block-level

preserveWhitespace.title: Preserve whitespace
preserveWhitespace.description: Preserve original whitespace in text content instead of collapsing it

preserveWhitespaceElements.title: Preserve whitespace elements
preserveWhitespaceElements.description: Element names that preserve whitespace regardless of the global setting

subfilters.title: Subfilters
subfilters.description: Array of {pattern, format} mappings for embedded content. Patterns use dot-separated element paths with glob support.

translatableAttributes.title: Translatable attributes
translatableAttributes.description: Attribute names that are translatable across all elements

translatableElements.title: Translatable elements
translatableElements.description: Element names whose text content is translatable. If empty, all text content is translatable.

useCodeFinder.title: Enable inline code detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based detection of inline codes within translatable text

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns that match inline codes within translatable text

extractNonStrings.title: Extract Non-String Values
extractNonStrings.description: Extract non-string scalar values (booleans, numbers, nulls) as translatable blocks

keyPathPatterns.title: Key Path Patterns
keyPathPatterns.description: When non-empty, only keys matching one of these glob patterns are extracted. Supports * (single key) and ** (any depth).

subfilter.title: Subfilter Format
subfilter.description: Sub-filter to apply to scalar values (e.g., 'html' to process HTML within YAML values)

useCodeFinder.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable regex-based inline code detection within string values
